title: Cardiovascular Anatomy & Physiology
description: Structure and function of the heart, cardiac conduction, hemodynamics, and regulation of blood pressure.

lessons.title: Anatomy of the Heart
lessons.description: Heart location, pericardium, layers, chambers, septum, and fibrous skeleton.

lessons.title: Heart Valves and Circulation
lessons.description: AV and semilunar valves, systemic and pulmonary circulation, coronary circulation.

lessons.title: Cardiac Muscle, Conduction System, and Cardiac Cycle
lessons.description: Cardiac muscle histology, action potential, refractory periods, conduction pathway, cardiac cycle phases, EDV/ESV, stroke volume, cardiac output, preload/afterload/contractility.

lessons.title: Structure and Function of Blood Vessels
lessons.description: Artery, arteriole, capillary, venule, and vein structure, three tunics, elastic vs muscular arteries, anastomoses, blood distribution.

lessons.title: Capillary Exchange, Hemodynamics, and BP Control
lessons.description: Diffusion, transcytosis, bulk flow, Starling's law, vascular resistance, SVR, venous return, MAP, baroreceptor/chemoreceptor reflexes, hormonal regulation, autoregulation, types of shock.

lessons.title: Module Exam
lessons.description: Comprehensive exam covering all Cardiovascular Anatomy & Physiology content.

audio.title: Cardiac Muscle, Conduction, and Cycle (Unit III)
Capillary Exchange, Hemodynamics, and BP Control (Unit V)
